transcription.text: Why that little lowlife, back again. Say, let's see what the rebel can do. Okay, you ramble rebel, let's ramble. Plenty of power. Ordering that big VA was a smart move. So was this transmission. Shift for me, automatic for Marge. They call it shift command. Good name. Good idea. Like the power disc brakes I got. Really safe. Good job, rebel. We're here. Okay, you animated teddy bear. Go on, get. Rebel, built with you and your safety in mind. Every minute of every working day, two more families make their choice a new American motor. Because quality is built in, not added on.
